title: Selling Music Online and Accepting Bitcoin Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a talented musician in Kenya with a passion for sharing your beats with the world, but you're stuck because PayPal and Stripe won't work for you. You've tried other options, but they either charge high fees or have complex verification processes that leave you frustrated and uncertain about getting paid for your music. It's time to break free from these limitations and discover a new way to sell your music online, one that's fair, transparent, and efficient. You're not alone in this struggle; many digital creators in your shoes have found a solution that's been hiding in plain sight – a solution that lets you accept Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies without needing PayPal or Stripe. Let's dive in and explore what this means for you and your music business.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling music online and accepting Bitcoin is not just a novelty for digital creators; it's a game-changer. With traditional payment processors, you're often stuck with high fees, complex verification processes, and geographic restrictions that limit your reach. By using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, you can bypass these limitations and tap into a global market that's eager to support artists like you. The benefits are clear: lower fees, faster payouts, and greater freedom to sell your music to anyone, anywhere in the world. This is what we call a 'web3' solution – a decentralized, blockchain-based approach that puts the power back in your hands as a creator.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

At its core, the technology behind selling music online and accepting Bitcoin is built on blockchain and cryptocurrency principles. With Web3 Wallet Connect, a plugin specifically designed for digital creators like you, you can integrate Bitcoin and other cryptocurrency payments into your online store. This plugin uses smart contracts to automate the delivery of your music when a sale is made, ensuring that you get paid instantly and securely. The process is seamless and transparent, with real-time analytics and transaction logs that give you complete control over your sales and earnings.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is specifically designed for digital creators like you – musicians, producers, and sound designers who want to sell their music online without being tied to traditional payment processors. By using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, you can tap into a global market that's eager to support artists like you. Whether you're just starting out or have an established fan base, this solution gives you the freedom to sell your music on your own terms, without the restrictions and fees that come with traditional payment processors.
Don't let fear hold you back from exploring new payment options.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The core components that make this solution work together are the Web3 Wallet Connect plugin, the NOWPayments cryptocurrency payment gateway, and the Core Shop Engine – a backend system that automates delivery and payment verification. With these components working together, you can set up a fully functional online store that accepts Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies, without the need for PayPal or Stripe. This setup is easy to use and requires minimal technical expertise, making it accessible to creators of all levels.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know the benefits of selling music online and accepting Bitcoin, it's time to take action. Start by integrating the Web3 Wallet Connect plugin into your online store, using the Core Shop Engine to automate delivery and payment verification. Set up a NOWPayments account to receive cryptocurrency payments, and start promoting your music to your existing fan base. With this solution, you can start selling your music online today and reach a global market that's eager to support artists like you.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The most common question we get is: 'Will I need to have a technical background to set up this solution?' The answer is no – our solution is designed to be easy to use, even for creators who don't have extensive technical expertise. With our step-by-step guide and dedicated support team, you can set up your online store and start selling your music online in just a few hours."
